title: Sportneer Balance Board indoor board skateboard, indoor surfboard trick board and balance board for children and adults
features: MULTIFUNCTIONAL 2 IN 1 SET: The Sportneer 2-in-1 set is a versatile balance board that helps you balance many of your favorite exercises. It comes with a balance board, a roller and a ball, so it easily fits your needs. There are 7 challenge modes available and 4 independent magnetic removable stoppers to make it convenient for you to adjust the distance for your preferred level.

YOUR PERSONAL BALANCE TRAINER: Take your balance, coordination and core strength to the next level with the Sportneer Balance Board. Whether you are a hobby skater, an avid athlete, a snowboarder, a skateboarder hobbyist, a stand up paddle enthusiast or a beginner, it is universal and suitable for everyone.

STRONG & STURDY: Built for maximum durability, this balance board is made of high quality birch and holds up to 204 kg. The elaborately crafted wheels will not scratch you or your floor. Say goodbye to leaking balls as our rollball is made of solid rubber materials.

A MUST HAVE FOR FITNESS ENTHUSIASTS: Keep your body fit and your muscles well trained by combining this balance board with other sports such as strength training or aerobics, making your workout more fun and dynamic. It is also a great helper to improve balance and stability in athletics such as martial arts, dance, gymnastics, etc.

NO FEAR OF SLIPPING: The surface of the Sportneer balance board trainer is matte material and provides a surprisingly non-slip grip. Whether you are with bare feet or wear shoes, it is safe and comfortable to use.
